urdu transliteration text:
Bano kahan talash karein apne laal ko
Jungle may maar daala hai zehra ki aal ko
english translation text:
Where should Bano search for her son?
The progeny of Zahra has been massacred in Karbala

urdu transliteration text: Bano kahan talash karei apne laal ko
english translation text: Where should Bano search for her son?

urdu transliteration text:
Shabbir laa rahe hai maidan se dekhiye
Apne zayeef kaandhon pa athara saal ko
His eighteen year-old son upon his ageing shoulders
english translation text: Observe, how Shabbir is bringing from the battlefield

urdu transliteration text: Bano kahan talash karei apne laal ko
english translation text: Where should Bano search for her son?

urdu transliteration text:
Shabbir dil ko thaam ke ghash khake gir pade
Dekha jo khoon may garkh nabi ke jamaal ko
Shabbir, clutching his heart, fainting fell
english translation text: When he saw the beauty of the Prophet drowned in blood

urdu transliteration text: Bano kahan talash karei apne laal ko
english translation text: Where should Bano search for her son?

urdu transliteration text:
Laila duvayein karti rahi baad e karbala
Ya rab juda na karna kisi maa se laal ko
Laila kept praying after Karbala
english translation text: O Lord, never separate a mother from her son

urdu transliteration text: Bano kahan talash karei apne laal ko
english translation text: Where should Bano search for her son?

urdu transliteration text:
Shabbir mere paas hai sadke ko bas yahi
jhoole se laake de diya bano ne laal ko
english translation text:
“Shabbir, this is all I have to offer as sacrifice”
Bano said, and gave him her son from the cradle

urdu transliteration text: Bano kahan talash karei apne laal ko
english translation text: Where should Bano search for her son?
